titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Griswold-Brewster Oral History Project, Yale University
Griswold-Brewster Oral History Project, Yale University
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday April 24, 2021 at 07:06

did.unittitle: Griswold-Brewster Oral History Project, Yale University
did.abstract: The records consist of audiotapes and transcripts of the Yale Griswold-Brewster Oral History Project.

corpname.part: Yale University. Griswold-Brewster Oral History Project

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 49 (YRG 49), Papers and projects on Yale.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The materials were a gift of the Griswold-Brewster history project, 1990-1995.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is closed for processing.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Griswold-Brewster History Project, Yale University (RU 217). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged in three series: I. Transcripts. II. Restricted Transcripts. III. Audiotapes.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Griswold-Brewster Oral History Project documents Yale during the tenures of A. Whitney Griswold and Kingman Brewster, Jr. as presidents of Yale. The project was funded by a group of Kingman Brewster's colleagues after his death. Geoffrey Kabaservice managed the project and conducted the interviews.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of audiotapes and transcripts of the Yale Griswold-Brewster Oral History Project.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access is restricted. Written permission of interviewee required.

odd.head: General
odd.p: The transcript is open for research. It has been transferred to the Transcripts series, box 7 folder 90a.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Several of the audiotapes for interviewees in Series III are restricted, restrictions are noted at the item level.

Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: As a preservation measure, original materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be used. Digital access copies must be provided for use. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access.
